subject: Security incident notification: partial customer-data exposure
body: PartnerCo detected unauthorized access to a replica database on Apr 14 at 22:18 UTC. The replica contained hashed credentials and email addresses for approximately 180,000 customers; your tenant is among the affected. Keys have been rotated and regulators notified. Recommended action: force password reset for all affected users within 72 hours. A detailed report will follow within 48 hours. Incident ID: IR-2026-0414.
